evals.prompt: I need to add a FermentationNote entity to the fermentation module — notes that winemakers attach to fermentations with free text and a timestamp. Should I write an ADR first, and if so, write it.
evals.expected_output: Checks ADR-INDEX for existing related ADRs, determines correct next number, writes a complete ADR using the template, updates ADR-INDEX.md, links from fermentation module-context.md, and stops without implementing.
assertions: Reads ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number — does not invent one
Writes ADR file at correct path /.ai-context/adr/ADR-NNN-*.md
ADR covers multi-tenancy scoping for the new entity
Updates ADR-INDEX.md with the new entry
Links the ADR from the fermentation module-context.md
Stops after writing the ADR — does not start implementing

evals.prompt: We want to add a caching layer to the analysis engine so we don't re-run anomaly detection on the same sample data. Write the ADR.
evals.expected_output: Checks ADR-INDEX first and finds that an ADR for this already exists (ADR-042), reports this, and does NOT create a duplicate. If no ADR exists, writes one with the correct number.
assertions: Detects that a related ADR already exists and avoids duplication
References the existing ADR by number and explains why no new one is needed
Does not create a duplicate ADR file
Tells the developer what the next step is

evals.prompt: We want to add a WinerySettings entity to store per-winery configuration like notification preferences, default protocols, and alert thresholds. Should we write an ADR first, and if so write it.
evals.expected_output: Determines ADR is required (new entity, new schema, cross-module impact). Reads ADR-INDEX for next number. Writes ADR covering storage choice, multi-tenancy, cross-module references. Updates ADR-INDEX.md. Links from winery module-context.md. Stops.
assertions: Reads ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number
Identifies cross-module impact (touches notifications ADR-040 and/or analysis ADR-020)
ADR covers the storage strategy decision (separate table vs columns vs JSON)
Updates ADR-INDEX.md with the new entry
Links the ADR from the winery module-context.md
Stops after writing the ADR — does not start implementing
